content.text:
<#
.SYNOPSIS
  Daily backup script: sync workspace changes to the OpenClaw repo and push to GitHub.
  Called automatically by OpenClaw cron job.
#>

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
$RepoDir = Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path
$WorkspaceDir = "$env:USERPROFILE\.openclaw\workspace"
$PluginSkillsDir = "$env:USERPROFILE\.openclaw\plugin-skills"
$DateStr = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"

Write-Host "=== Daily Backup: $DateStr ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan

# Check if we have a repo
if (-not (Test-Path "$RepoDir\.git")) {
    Write-Host "ERROR: No git repo found at $RepoDir" -ForegroundColor Red
    exit 1
}

# 1. Sync workspace files
Write-Host "[1/4] Syncing workspace files..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
$workspaceFiles = @("AGENTS.md", "SOUL.md", "IDENTITY.md", "USER.md", "TOOLS.md", "HEARTBEAT.md", "MEMORY.md")
$changed = $false
foreach ($f in $workspaceFiles) {
    $src = "$WorkspaceDir\$f"
    $dst = "$RepoDir\workspace\$f"
    if (Test-Path $src) {
        Copy-Item $src $dst -Force
        $changed = $true
    }
}

# 2. Sync memory files
Write-Host "[2/4] Syncing memory files..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
if (Test-Path "$WorkspaceDir\memory") {
    $memoryFiles = Get-ChildItem "$WorkspaceDir\memory\*.md" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    if ($memoryFiles) {
        robocopy "$WorkspaceDir\memory" "$RepoDir\memory" *.md /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NP > $null
        $changed = $true
    }
}

# 3. Sync skills (SKILL.md only, not scripts which rarely change)
Write-Host "[3/4] Syncing skill files..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
$skillDirs = Get-ChildItem "$PluginSkillsDir" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
foreach ($skill in $skillDirs) {
    $skillName = $skill.Name
    $srcSkill = "$PluginSkillsDir\$skillName\SKILL.md"
    $dstSkill = "$RepoDir\skills\$skillName\SKILL.md"
    if (Test-Path $srcSkill) {
        # Create dest dir if needed
        $null = New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$RepoDir\skills\$skillName"
        Copy-Item $srcSkill $dstSkill -Force
    }
}

# 4. Commit and push
Write-Host "[4/4] Committing and pushing..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
cd $RepoDir

# Check for changes
$status = git status --porcelain 2>&1
if ($status) {
    git add -A 2>&1 | Out-Null
    git commit -m "daily backup: $DateStr" 2>&1 | Out-Null
    
    # Push (using stored credential helper)
    git push 2>&1 | Out-Null
    
    # Get the commit hash
    $commitHash = git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>&1
    Write-Host "  鉁?Pushed commit $commitHash" -ForegroundColor Green
    return "Backup successful: commit $commitHash"
} else {
    Write-Host "  - No changes to backup" -ForegroundColor Gray
    return "No changes to backup"
}

content.text:
<#
.SYNOPSIS
  One-command setup to replicate OpenClaw agent on a new machine.
.DESCRIPTION
  Copies skills, workspace files, memory, and config template
  from the cloned repo to the correct ~/.openclaw/ locations.
#>

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
$RepoDir = Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path
$OpenClawDir = "$env:USERPROFILE\.openclaw"
$PluginSkillsDir = "$OpenClawDir\plugin-skills"
$WorkspaceDir = "$OpenClawDir\workspace"

Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  OpenClaw Agent Setup" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host ""

# 1. Create directories if missing
Write-Host "[1/5] Creating directories..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
mkdir $PluginSkillsDir -Force | Out-Null
mkdir "$WorkspaceDir\memory" -Force | Out-Null
Write-Host "  鉁?Done"

# 2. Copy skills
Write-Host "[2/5] Installing skills..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
$skillDirs = Get-ChildItem "$RepoDir\skills" -Directory
foreach ($skill in $skillDirs) {
    $dest = "$PluginSkillsDir\$($skill.Name)"
    if (Test-Path $dest) {
        Write-Host "  鈿?$($skill.Name) already exists, skipping"
    } else {
        Copy-Item -Recurse $skill.FullName $dest
        Write-Host "  鉁?$($skill.Name)"
    }
}

# 3. Copy workspace files
Write-Host "[3/5] Copying workspace files..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
$workspaceFiles = @("AGENTS.md", "SOUL.md", "IDENTITY.md", "USER.md", "TOOLS.md", "HEARTBEAT.md")
foreach ($f in $workspaceFiles) {
    $src = "$RepoDir\workspace\$f"
    $dest = "$WorkspaceDir\$f"
    if (Test-Path $src) {
        if ((Test-Path $dest) -and $f -in @("AGENTS.md", "SOUL.md", "TOOLS.md", "HEARTBEAT.md")) {
            Write-Host "  ~ $f already exists, kept existing"
        } else {
            Copy-Item $src $dest -Force
            Write-Host "  鉁?$f"
        }
    }
}

# 4. Copy memory if any
Write-Host "[4/5] Copying memory files..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
$memoryFiles = Get-ChildItem "$RepoDir\memory\*.md" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
if ($memoryFiles) {
    Copy-Item "$RepoDir\memory\*.md" "$WorkspaceDir\memory\" -Force
    Write-Host "  鉁?$($memoryFiles.Count) file(s)"
} else {
    Write-Host "  - No memory files to copy"
}

# Handle top-level MEMORY.md
if (Test-Path "$RepoDir\memory\MEMORY.md") {
    Copy-Item "$RepoDir\memory\MEMORY.md" "$WorkspaceDir\MEMORY.md" -Force
    Write-Host "  鉁?MEMORY.md"
}

# 5. Config template hint
Write-Host "[5/5] Config setup..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
$configDest = "$OpenClawDir\openclaw.json"
if (Test-Path $configDest) {
    Write-Host "  ~ Config exists, review skills section in $configDest"
    Write-Host "    Add the 'skills.load.extraDirs' and 'skills.entries' as shown in README.md"
} else {
    Write-Host "  鈿?No config file found. Copy sample from:"
    Write-Host "    Copy-Item '$RepoDir\config\openclaw.json' '$configDest'"
    Write-Host "    Then edit the file and fill in your tokens."
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "  Setup Complete!" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Next steps:" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  1. Restart OpenClaw: openclaw gateway restart"
Write-Host "  2. Check skills are loaded: (ask me '鍙戜竴涓嬩綘鐨勬妧鑳藉垪琛?)"
Write-Host "  3. Set up cookies for DevOps/GitLab/TAPD as needed"

}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Next steps:" -ForegroundColor Yellow

content.text:
# 🤖 OpenClaw Backup

> Your OpenClaw agent's brain 鈥?skills, memory, workflow & config, fully replicable.
> Clone this repo on any new machine, run one script, and your agent is back.

## 馃摝 What's Backed Up

| 鐩綍 | 鍐呭 |
|------|------|
| `skills/` | 6 涓嚜瀹氫箟鎶€鑳?鈥?DevOps 閮ㄧ讲銆丟itLab 鏉冮檺銆佽蹇嗙鐞嗐€侀厤琛ㄧ紪杈戙€乀APD 鎻愬崟 |
| `workspace/` | 鏍稿績浜烘牸鏂囦欢 鈥?AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md, HEARTBEAT.md 绛?|
| `memory/` | 闀挎湡璁板繂鍜屾瘡鏃ユ棩蹇?|
| `config/` | OpenClaw 閰嶇疆妯℃澘锛堟晱鎰熶俊鎭凡鑴辨晱锛?|
| `setup.ps1` | 涓€閿儴缃茶剼鏈?|

## 馃搧 Structure

```
OpenClaw/
鈹溾攢鈹€ skills/                    # Custom plugin skills
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ update-server/         # DevOps CI/CD server deployment
鈹?  鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ SKILL.md           # Pipeline config, dest mapping, build steps
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ gitlab-permission/     # GitLab project member management
鈹?  鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ SKILL.md
鈹?  鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ scripts/git_permission.mjs
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ memory-keeper/         # Auto save session highlights to memory files
鈹?  鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ SKILL.md
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ solo-config-field/     # Add columns to Luban game config tables (Excel)
鈹?  鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ SKILL.md
鈹?  鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ scripts/add_field.mjs
鈹?  鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ package.json
鈹?  鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ package-lock.json
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ tapd-bug-create/       # Create TAPD bug tickets via Playwright
鈹?  鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ SKILL.md
鈹?  鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ scripts/create_bug.mjs
鈹?  鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ scripts/create_story.mjs
鈹?  鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ references/
鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ tapd-vsmode-story/     # Create 1V1 VSMODE requirement tickets on TAPD
鈹?      鈹斺攢鈹€ SKILL.md
鈹溾攢鈹€ workspace/                 # Agent personality & config files
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ AGENTS.md              # Agent guidelines & memory rules
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ SOUL.md                # Personality & soul
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ IDENTITY.md            # Identity (fill in your own!)
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ USER.md                # About your human (fill in!)
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ TOOLS.md               # Local setup notes
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ HEARTBEAT.md           # Periodic heartbeat tasks
鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ MEMORY.md              # Long-term memory (grows over time)
鈹溾攢鈹€ memory/                    # Daily memory logs
鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ YYYY-MM-DD.md
鈹溾攢鈹€ config/                    # Configuration templates (secrets redacted)
鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ openclaw.json          # Redacted, fill in your own tokens
鈹溾攢鈹€ setup.ps1                  # One-command setup for new machines
鈹斺攢鈹€ README.md                  # This file
```

## 馃殌 Setup (New Machine)

### Prerequisites

- **OpenClaw** installed on the target machine
- **Node.js** 18+
- **Git**
- A **GitHub Personal Access Token** (classic, with `repo` scope)

### One-Command Setup

```powershell
# 1. Clone
git clone https://github.com/yoshikun/OpenClaw.git
cd OpenClaw

# 2. Run setup (copies skills, workspace, memory to ~/.openclaw)
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File setup.ps1

# 3. Configure openclaw.json
#    Edit: ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json
#    Add skills section:

```

### Skills Registration

Add this to the `skills` section of `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`:

```jsonc
{
  "skills": {
    "allowBundled": [
      "skill-creator",
      "taskflow",
      "taskflow-inbox-triage"
    ],
    "load": {
      "extraDirs": ["~/.openclaw/plugin-skills"],
      "watch": true
    },
    "entries": {
      "update-server":      { "enabled": true },
      "gitlab-permission":  { "enabled": true },
      "memory-keeper":      { "enabled": true },
      "solo-config-field":  { "enabled": true },
      "tapd-bug-create":    { "enabled": true },
      "tapd-vsmode-story":  { "enabled": true }
    }
  }
}
```

### Restart

```powershell
# 4. Restart gateway to load new skills
openclaw gateway restart

# 5. Verify 鈥?ask your agent:
#    "鍙戜竴涓嬩綘鐨勬妧鑳藉垪琛?
```

## 馃洜锔?Skills Overview

### update-server (鏈嶅姟绔儴缃?
- DevOps CI/CD pipeline for game server deployment
- **Project:** 1v1 (`dest` values: 1v1_test, 1v1_dev, 1v1_qa, 1v1_zhuanxiang, 1v1_cehua1, 1v1_cehua2)
- **Prerequisite:** `workspace/devops_cookies.json`
- **Pipeline:** https://devops.devcloud.ztgame.com/projects/yyzy/pipelines/p-f78c977835c84b71a6d58b4746cd1c4a

### gitlab-permission (GitLab 鏉冮檺绠＄悊)
- Add/remove/search members on git.devcloud.ztgame.com
- **Managed repos:** yyzy_proj/1v1/config, yyzy_proj/gordian/gameconfig, etc.
- **Prerequisite:** `workspace/gitlab_cookies.json` + CSRF token

### memory-keeper (璁板繂绠″)
- Automatically saves conversation highlights, decisions, and new learnings
- Archives to MEMORY.md, daily files, and skill files
- Triggered by information exchange or explicit "鏇存柊鎶€鑳藉拰璁板繂" command

### solo-config-field (閰嶈〃鍔犲瓧娈?
- Add columns to Luban config tables (Excel-based game config)
- Supports KV tables (Common.xlsx) and list tables (Card.xlsx, Buff.xlsx, etc.)
- **Requires:** SoloConfig submodule at `E:\Solo\nightoffullmoon\client\config\SoloConfig\`

### tapd-bug-create (TAPD 鎻愬崟)
- Create bug tickets on TAPD (鑵捐鏁忔嵎浜у搧鐮斿彂骞冲彴)
- **Workspace:** 31253609 (鏈堝渾涔嬪)
- Supports screenshots, auto-complete handlers, default assignment rules
- **Prerequisite:** `workspace/tapd_cookies.json` + Playwright

### tapd-vsmode-story (TAPD 闇€姹傚崟)
- Create 1V1 VSMODE requirement tickets with preset sub-items
- 6 templates: client / server / design / ui / motion / audio
- **Prerequisite:** `workspace/tapd_cookies_yezhijun.json` + Playwright

## 鈿狅笍 Important Notes

- **Secrets are excluded!** Cookie files (`*_cookies.json`), CSRF tokens, and session cookies are in `.gitignore` and never committed.
- **Config template has secrets redacted** (`***redacted***`). Fill in your own tokens on the new machine.
- **Each new machine needs its own cookies.** DevOps, GitLab, and TAPD all require browser-based SSO login.
- **MEMORY.md and daily logs grow over time** 鈥?they're backed up here, so commit and push regularly to keep them synced.

## 馃攧 Keeping in Sync

```powershell
cd OpenClaw

# Backup latest changes from this machine
# (copy updated workspace/memory files to the repo)
xcopy /E /Y "$env:USERPROFILE\.openclaw\workspace\*.md" "workspace\"
xcopy /E /Y "$env:USERPROFILE\.openclaw\workspace\memory\*.md" "memory\"

# Commit and push
git add .
git commit -m "sync: update memory and workspace"
git push
```

---

*Made by [yoshikun](https://github.com/yoshikun) 鈥?because your agent should remember who it is, even on a new machine.*

> Your OpenClaw agent's brain 鈥?skills, memory, workflow & config, fully replicable.
> Clone this repo on any new machine, run one script, and your agent is back.

## 馃摝 What's Backed Up

| 鐩綍 | 鍐呭 |
|------|------|
| `skills/` | 6 涓嚜瀹氫箟鎶€鑳?鈥?DevOps 閮ㄧ讲銆丟itLab 鏉冮檺銆佽蹇嗙鐞嗐€侀厤琛ㄧ紪杈戙€乀APD 鎻愬崟 |

## 馃搧 Structure

```
OpenClaw/
鈹溾攢鈹€ skills/                    # Custom plugin skills

鈹?      鈹斺攢鈹€ SKILL.md
鈹溾攢鈹€ workspace/                 # Agent personality & config files
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ AGENTS.md              # Agent guidelines & memory rules
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ SOUL.md                # Personality & soul
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ IDENTITY.md            # Identity (fill in your own!)
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ USER.md                # About your human (fill in!)
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ TOOLS.md               # Local setup notes
鈹?  鈹溾攢鈹€ HEARTBEAT.md           # Periodic heartbeat tasks
鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ MEMORY.md              # Long-term memory (grows over time)
鈹溾攢鈹€ memory/                    # Daily memory logs
鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ YYYY-MM-DD.md

鈹?  鈹斺攢鈹€ openclaw.json          # Redacted, fill in your own tokens
鈹溾攢鈹€ setup.ps1                  # One-command setup for new machines
鈹斺攢鈹€ README.md                  # This file
```

## 馃殌 Setup (New Machine)

### Prerequisites

- **OpenClaw** installed on the target machine
- **Node.js** 18+
- **Git**
- A **GitHub Personal Access Token** (classic, with `repo` scope)

### One-Command Setup

```powershell
# 1. Clone
git clone https://github.com/yoshikun/OpenClaw.git
cd OpenClaw

# 2. Run setup (copies skills, workspace, memory to ~/.openclaw)
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File setup.ps1

# 3. Configure openclaw.json
#    Edit: ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json
#    Add skills section:

```

### Skills Registration

Add this to the `skills` section of `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`:

```jsonc
{
  "skills": {
    "allowBundled": [
      "skill-creator",
      "taskflow",
      "taskflow-inbox-triage"
    ],
    "load": {
      "extraDirs": ["~/.openclaw/plugin-skills"],
      "watch": true
    },
    "entries": {
      "update-server":      { "enabled": true },
      "gitlab-permission":  { "enabled": true },
      "memory-keeper":      { "enabled": true },
      "solo-config-field":  { "enabled": true },
      "tapd-bug-create":    { "enabled": true },
      "tapd-vsmode-story":  { "enabled": true }
    }
  }
}
```

### Restart

```powershell
# 4. Restart gateway to load new skills
openclaw gateway restart

# 5. Verify 鈥?ask your agent:
#    "鍙戜竴涓嬩綘鐨勬妧鑳藉垪琛?
```
